meta.title: Solven Syntrix — Digital Infrastructure for Syria
meta.description: A technology operations and investment company focused on establishing scalable digital ecosystems in Syria.

hero.headline: Powering the Next Generation of Syrian Technology
hero.body: We invest in and operate the digital infrastructure driving Syria's future.

about.headline: We are more than a service provider.
about.body: We are a regional technology operations and investment company with operational roots in Saudi Arabia, enabling digital transformation in Syria through a model that integrates:
about.closing: We are not a traditional service provider. We are a partner in building scalable, sustainable digital ecosystems.

whyNow.headline: A market at its digital inflection point.
whyNow.body: The Syrian market is entering an unstructured phase of digital restructuring, with significant gaps in:
whyNow.closing: This gap represents a strategic opportunity to build modern digital foundations from the ground up — aligned with global standards and long-term vision.
whyNow.emphasis: We operate within this foundational phase.

cards.title: Scalable Digital Infrastructure
cards.closing: Built for regional scalability from day one.

cards.title: Operational Technology Investment
cards.closing: We invest in systems — not just ideas.

businessModel.headline: A clear framework for every engagement.
businessModel.body: Our framework balances risk, innovation, and sustainability.

valueProposition.headline: Built for long-term impact.
valueProposition.body: We build for long-term impact, not short-term gains.
points: Deep understanding of local market dynamics

vision.headline: A key driver of digital transformation in Syria.
vision.body: Over the coming years, we aim to:
points: Establish a network of interconnected technology ventures
Attract quality investment into the sector
Develop a model scalable across the region
vision.closing: We aspire to become a key driver of digital transformation in Syria.

governance.headline: Trust is the foundation of every partnership.

cta.headline: Ready to build the future together?
cta.body: Whether you are an investor seeking strategic technology opportunities, a company building scalable digital infrastructure, or a venture looking for a long-term technical partner — we are ready to connect.

contact.headline: Let's start a conversation.
contact.body: Fill in the form and we will get back to you within 48 hours.

contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Building the next digital infrastructure of the Syrian market.

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyse site traffic.
cookie.title: We use cookies

sections.title: Introduction
sections.body: Solven Syntrix ('we', 'our', 'us') is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information when you visit our website or engage with our services.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: We may collect information you provide directly (name, email, message via our contact form), information collected automatically (cookies, log data, device information), and information from third-party services we use to operate our platform.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to respond to inquiries, improve our website, communicate about partnership opportunities, comply with legal obligations, and analyse site usage to enhance user experience.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: We use essential cookies required for the site to function and analytical cookies (with your consent) to understand how visitors interact with our content. You can manage cookie preferences through the banner on your first visit.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.body: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by law. Contact form submissions are retained for up to 12 months.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@solvensyntrix.com.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related inquiries, please email privacy@solvensyntrix.com.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using the Solven Syntrix website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use this site.

sections.title: Use of the Website
sections.body: You may use this website for lawful purposes only. You agree not to use the site in any way that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair our services, or interfere with any other party's use of the site.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website — including text, graphics, logos, and code — is the property of Solven Syntrix or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Unauthorised reproduction is prohibited.

sections.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.body: This website is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not warrant that the site will be error-free, uninterrupted, or free of viruses or other harmful components.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Solven Syntrix shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the website.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.body: Our site may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites.

sections.title: Changes to These Terms
sections.body: We reserve the right to update these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting to this page. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For questions about these Terms, please contact legal@solvensyntrix.com.
